archetype.name: Butterfly Blade
archetype.note: This archetype offers Combat Assessment at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Combat Assessment
feat.text: You make a telegraphed attack to learn about your foe. Make a melee Strike. On a hit, you can immediately attempt a check to Recall Knowledge about the target. On a critical hit, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the check to Recall Knowledge. The target is temporarily immune to Combat Assessment for 1 day.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
